title: Register Incoming Flights
description: The system shall accept and store flight number, aircraft type, and scheduled time for incoming flights.
rationale: To enable the air traffic controller to track all aircraft movements accurately.
business_value: Improves operational efficiency by providing real-time data on incoming aircraft.

source.description: As a air traffic controller I need register incoming and outgoing flights with their details (flight number, type, scheduled time) So that the system can track all aircraft movements

acceptance_criteria: The system records the incoming flight with flight number 'AA123', type 'Boeing 737', and scheduled time '14:30'
The flight appears in the aircraft movement log after registration
preconditions: The system is ready to accept flight registrations
postconditions: The incoming flight has been stored in the system
The flight details (flight number, type, scheduled time) are accurately recorded
The aircraft movement log is updated with the new flight registration
functional_constraints: All required fields (flight number, aircraft type, scheduled time) must be provided for successful registration
Flights can be registered separately for incoming and outgoing aircraft
security_requirements: No security requirements specified at this time

non_functional_requirements.usability: Error handling must be robust and interface should provide clear feedback for successful or failed registrations

edge_cases: Flight number already exists in the system
Empty or null flight number, type, or scheduled time provided during registration

interfaces.name: Aircraft Movement Log Database
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with this database to store and retrieve flight details.

interfaces.name: Flight Registration API
interfaces.description: The requirement utilizes this API to accept incoming flight registrations from the air traffic controller.

test_cases.description: Register an incoming flight with valid details.
test_cases.expected_result: The system records the flight and it appears in the aircraft movement log.

test_cases.description: Attempt to register a flight with an empty flight number.
test_cases.expected_result: The registration fails with an error message indicating that all required fields must be provided.

test_cases.description: Register multiple incoming flights with different details.
test_cases.expected_result: All flights are recorded accurately and appear in the aircraft movement log.
